data.title: Morrison Healthcare awarded by Modern Healthcare for sustainability.
data.description: Atlanta-based Morrison Healthcare has been honored by Modern Healthcare as a recipient of the Best in Business award in the Sustainability category. This recognition highlights Morrison Healthcare's commitment to environmentally friendly practices, showcasing their dedication to sustainability within their operations. Being selected as one of the award winners signifies Morrison Healthcare's exemplary efforts in promoting sustainability within the industry.

data.title: Collaboration between Woodford Reserve and Compartés releases limited-edition S'mores Chocolate Bar infused with Double Oaked Bourbon.
data.description: In Versailles, Kentucky, Woodford Reserve and Compartés have joined forces to introduce a limited-edition S'mores Chocolate Bar infused with Woodford Reserve Double Oaked Bourbon. This collaboration represents the third consecutive year of partnership between Master Distiller Elizabeth McCall and chocolatier Jonathan Grahm. The release aims to evoke campfire nostalgia and capitalize on the winter season by incorporating the distinctive flavors of Double Oaked Bourbon, such as vanilla, butterscotch, and caramel. This unique offering combines the expertise of both brands to create a delightful treat that resonates with consumers seeking a touch of indulgence.
PARAMOUNT PLANS TO NOMINATE DIRECTORS FOR ELECTION TO WBD BOARD

data.title: Ai Technology Group Inc. (OTCID:AIPG) and AVM Biotechnology Inc. announce merger; details revealed in joint press release.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, Ai Technology Group Inc. (OTCID:AIPG) based in Reno, Nevada, and AVM Biotechnology Inc. from Washington State announced a proposed merger in a joint press release. The merger involves AIPG acquiring AVM Biotechnology Inc. in the deal. This collaboration signifies a significant move in the industry, demonstrating the intention of both companies to combine their resources and expertise. AIPG, a technology company, and AVM, a biotechnology firm, aim to capitalize on their respective strengths through this merger. This partnership is expected to bring together their unique capabilities to drive innovation and growth in their shared market.

data.title: Omada Health releases estimated revenue figures for Q4 and FY 2025, exceeding $X million.
data.description: A recent report revealed that the annual revenue of the tech giant reached $100 billion for the first time in their history. The company's profits also surged to $20 billion, marking a significant increase of 15% from the previous year. This growth has been attributed to the successful launch of new products and an expansion in their customer base. Additionally, the company announced plans to invest $10 billion in research and development for the upcoming year, with a focus on innovation and sustainability. The CEO expressed optimism about the company's future prospects and stated that they are well-positioned for continued growth in the market.
Paramount Skydance: Will propose an amendment to WBD’s bylaws to require WBD shareholder approval for any separation of global networks. $PSKY

data.title: Dollar, bonds, and stocks fall as threat to Fed Chair Powell emerges, sparking "sell America" trend from 2020.
data.description: Last year witnessed a notable movement away from U.S. financial assets, reminiscent of the "sell America" trade trend from before.

data.title: SSA sets minimum standards for stablecoins, as Wyoming's FRNT faces early scrutiny. New Working Group formed.
data.description: On January 12, 2026, the Stablecoin Standards Authority (SSA), operating under FedMSB, announced the formation of the Public-Sector-Associated Stablecoins (Non-CBDC) Standards Technical Working Group (referred to as the "Working Group"). The Working Group aims to set industry standards for stablecoins not backed by central banks. This initiative is a part of the SSA's efforts to regulate the sector and enhance transparency. This move comes at a crucial time as stablecoin adoption continues to rise, reaching a market cap of approximately $150 billion. The Working Group will play a vital role in shaping the future of stablecoins in the financial market, ensuring security and stability for users and investors.

data.title: Yesway opens 2 Allsup's in Odessa & Monahans, Texas. Total Texas stores now 250. Fast-growing convenience chain.
data.description: A prominent convenience retailer operating under the brand Yesway has expanded its presence significantly, now boasting a total of 250 stores in the state of Texas. This growth was highlighted by the recent launch of two new Allsup's stores in Odessa and Monahans. The company, recognized as one of the rapidly expanding convenience store chains in the country, marked the conclusion of the previous year with these new additions, continuing its strategic expansion efforts. The development signifies a notable milestone in the retailer's expansion strategy and its commitment to serving customers within the region.

data.title: Paramount seeks to advance its $30/share offer to Warner Bros. Discovery shareholders, plans to nominate directors and halt Netflix deal.
data.description: Plans are being made to nominate a group of directors to be elected at the WBD 2026 Annual Meeting, alongside a move to campaign against the approval of the Netflix transaction. A lawsuit has been filed with the aim of obtaining essential details for WBD shareholders, ensuring they have the necessary information to make well-informed decisions. This development arose on January 12, 2026, with actions taking place in Los Angeles and New York.

data.title: Tractor Supply opens 2,400th store in Aiken, SC, aims for 100 new stores by end of 2026. #TSCO #retail #expansion
data.description: In Brentwood, Tennessee, Tractor Supply Company (NASDAQ: TSCO), the leading rural lifestyle retailer in the U.S., has recently inaugurated its 2,400th store in Aiken, South Carolina. This Aiken location is among the four Tractor Supply stores opening their doors for Grand Openings in the initial weeks of 2026. The company aims to launch a total of 100 new stores by the conclusion of this year, marking a rapid expansion. The latest Aiken store, nestled on the north side of the town, boasts a range of offerings.

data.title: Lucretia Gilbert appointed as President & CEO of Ronald McDonald House New York, effective Jan 26, 2026.
data.description: Ronald McDonald House New York (RMH-NY) has named Lucretia Gilbert as its incoming President & CEO, taking on the role from January 26, 2026. Gilbert will be succeeding Dr. Ruth C. Browne, who has led the organization through a period of significant growth and impact for almost ten years. With over 25 years of experience in nonprofit management, Gilbert is known for her ability to foster sustained growth and engage donors effectively. Her appointment marks a new chapter for RMH-NY as it continues its mission to support families in need.

data.title: Kalahari Resorts opens bookings on Jan. 12, 2026 for new Virginia resort in Spotsylvania; features indoor/outdoor waterparks.
data.description: A resort in Spotsylvania, VA, Kalahari Resorts & Conventions, known for having America’s Largest Indoor Waterparks, has started accepting bookings for its newest location. Kalahari Spotsylvania, being developed in the area, will offer the renowned “Beyond Expectations” experience from Kalahari. The resort will have a large indoor and outdoor waterpark, along with family entertainment, dining options, and meeting/convention spaces within the same facility. Bookings began on Jan. 12, offering guests a sneak peek into what the site will offer once completed.

data.title: Dow falls 300 points on Powell probe; Abercrombie plunges on outlook. Nvidia and Tesla also decline.
data.description: Today, the Dow Jones index experienced a significant decrease of 300 points due to an investigation involving Federal Reserve Chair Powell. Abercrombie suffered a substantial drop in its stock value, whereas Nvidia and Tesla also saw declines. This event was covered in the live broadcast titled "Stock Market Today: Dow Falls 300 Points On Powell Probe; Abercrombie Plunges On Outlook," which was provided by Investor's Business Daily.

data.title: Subaru partners with Operation Warm to support 140,000 children in need amid rising homelessness.
data.description: Subaru of America, Inc. (SOA) has revealed its annual Subaru Loves to Help® campaign, which is set to aid over 140,000 children across the country through planned gifting events during this season. This initiative marks the third year of collaboration between SOA and Operation Warm®. The program seeks to bring joy and support to children in need.

data.title: CCM Institute celebrates one-year anniversary of launch, recognizing 31% increase in global adoption of Contract Management Standard™.
data.description: RESTON, Virginia, January 12, 2026 - The Commerce & Contract Management Institute (CCM Institute) is commemorating its one-year anniversary since its establishment. This milestone signifies substantial advancements in the field of commercial and contract management. The institute acknowledges 31 individuals for their contributions to this progress.

data.title: LabCentral appoints Kamran Tavangar as Head of Science Strategy to enhance scientific programming and collaboration.
data.description: A co-founder of Affinivax and former executive at Novartis, Kamran Tavangar, has been appointed as LabCentral's Head of Science Strategy in Cambridge, Massachusetts. The announcement was made on January 12, 2026. In his new position, Kamran will be responsible for expanding scientific programming and fostering collaborations within the organization. This move comes as part of LabCentral's efforts to enhance its scientific initiatives and partnerships under Kamran’s leadership.

data.title: SFA declares SenseMaxxing as top trend of 2026, part of 6 key trends at FancyFare; guides for consumer trends ahead.
data.description: New York, Jan. 12, 2026 - The Specialty Food Association (SFA) has introduced SenseMaxxing as the leading trend for the year. By closely monitoring changes in consumer behaviors, preferences, and values, the association aims to provide insights into the forthcoming food, beverage, and culinary trends. This initiative comes as a guide for businesses and professionals to stay attuned to the evolving landscape.

data.title: NowThis promotes Matt Grandchamp to SVP, Head of Revenue in a breakout year with accelerated revenue growth.
data.description: NowThis's heightened success is highlighted by Grandchamp's increased responsibilities, which mirror the company's rapid revenue growth, broadened brand partnerships, and cutting-edge strategies for modern media monetization. The development comes as NowThis announced its latest achievements in New York on January 12, 2026. This platform caters to Gen Z's preferences, showcasing popular shows and facilitating brand integration.

data.title: Understood.org debuts "ADHD Unstuck" to aid women with ADHD manage mood & overcome winter blues. Survey finds 58% of women, 81% with ADHD are more mentally overwhelmed now.
data.description: According to a recent survey conducted by the Harris Poll, it was found that 58% of women, along with a staggering 81% of women diagnosed with ADHD, experience increased mental overwhelm during this particular time of the year. The survey results were released on January 12, 2026, by Understood.org, a prominent nonprofit organization dedicated to assisting the 70 million individuals across the United States who are impacted by learning and attention issues.
